name: part_006
file: tmp_【チラ見せ】ねぽらぼライブ re：VISION Holoearth Live【#ねぽらぼホロアースライブ】 [3UyVL-E9DYk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_006.webm

scenes.description: MC section where the members of NePoLaBo talk to the audience and prepare for the live.
Countdown to the start of the live performance.

subtitles.original: さて、みんな。
subtitles.english: Well then, everyone.

subtitles.original: 遊びに来る準備はできてるかな？
subtitles.english: Are you ready to come play?

subtitles.original: ねねが描いたTシャツ着てる人いるかな？
subtitles.english: Is anyone wearing the T-shirt Nene drew?

subtitles.original: 雪民さんたちがどんな姿で会いに来てくれるか楽しみ！
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to seeing how all you Yukimin come to meet us!

subtitles.original: ホロアースのライブだから、好きな服装でライブ見れるのもいいよね。
subtitles.english: Since it's a Holoearth live, it's great that you can watch in whatever outfit you like.

subtitles.original: スクショも撮っていいみたいなので、色んな角度からたくさん撮ってほしいです！
subtitles.english: It seems you can take screenshots too, so I want you to take plenty from various angles!

subtitles.original: そう、普通のライブだと動いて見て回ったりはできないもんね。
subtitles.english: Yeah, you can't usually move around and look from different spots at a normal live.

subtitles.original: ねんたちの最高の写真、期待してるぞー！
subtitles.english: I'm expecting some great photos of us!

subtitles.original: というわけで、ライブ開始までもうしばらくお待ちください。
subtitles.english: So, please wait a little longer until the live starts.

subtitles.original: 一緒にライブ盛り上がって行こー！
subtitles.english: Let's get hyped for the live together!

subtitles.original: おー！
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' Now
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin' Now

subtitles.original: ねぽらぼライブ re:VISION 始まるぞー！
subtitles.english: NePoLaBo Live re:VISION is starting!

subtitles.original: Hyper Jumpin' Now
subtitles.english: Hyper Jumpin' Now
